commands.code:
try:
    # Environment-specific values must be replaced during deployment, never with reference-bot IDs.
    ADMIN_IDS = ["SUPER_ADMIN_TELEGRAM_ID_PLACEHOLDER"]
    SUPER_ADMIN_IDS = ["SUPER_ADMIN_TELEGRAM_ID_PLACEHOLDER"]
    LOG_CHANNEL_ID = "LOG_CHANNEL_ID_PLACEHOLDER"
    TRACKING_CHANNEL_ID = "TRACKING_CHANNEL_ID_PLACEHOLDER"
    REEL_POOL_CHANNEL_ID = "REEL_POOL_CHANNEL_ID_PLACEHOLDER"
    BOT_TIMEZONE = "Asia/Kolkata"
    IWMS_VERSION = "1.0"
except Exception:
    pass

try:
    # Seeds frozen v1.0 constants, enums, and role permissions.
    now = libs.DateAndTime.now(BOT_TIMEZONE)
    timestamp = now["date"] + " " + now["time"]

    constants = {
        "version": IWMS_VERSION,
        "timezone": BOT_TIMEZONE,
        "default_first_work_deadline_hours": 3,
        "slot_gap_minutes": 120,
        "regular_work_deadline_buffer_minutes": 30,
        "screenshot_edit_window_minutes": 10,
        "support_reminder_hours": [24, 72, 168],
        "support_reopen_window_days": 7,
        "no_sla_waiting_states": ["Review Queue", "Investigation", "Setup Verification", "Withdrawal Verification", "Appeal Review"],
        "single_export_file": "IWMS.json"
    }

    enums = {
        "worker.status": ["New", "Applying", "Training", "VerificationPending", "Active", "Paused", "Suspended", "Removed", "AppealPending", "Deleted"],
        "worker.removal_type": ["Voluntary", "SevereViolation"],
        "instagram_account.status": ["Active", "Replaced", "UnderReview"],
        "work.type": ["FirstWork", "RegularSlot"],
        "work.status": ["Pending", "Submitted", "Missed", "UnderReview", "Completed"],
        "review.final_outcome": ["Approved", "Rejected", "UnderInvestigation"],
        "review.decision": ["Approve", "Reject"],
        "review.severity": ["Minor", "Major", "Critical"],
        "investigation.mode": ["Standard", "Restricted"],
        "investigation.result": ["FalseAlarm", "RedoWork", "PolicyViolation", "SevereFraud"],
        "ledger.type": ["RewardCredit", "WithdrawLock", "Processing", "Withdrawn", "Available", "Forfeited"],
        "withdrawal.workflow_status": ["PendingReview", "Approved", "ReadyForPayroll", "Processing", "Paid", "Cancelled", "Rejected", "Closed"],
        "withdrawal.payment_method": ["UPI", "Bank"],
        "appeal.status": ["Draft", "Submitted", "UnderReview", "Approved", "Rejected", "Cancelled"],
        "appeal.category": ["WrongRemoval", "WrongPenalty", "WrongForfeit", "WrongReviewDecision", "Other"],
        "appeal.employment_decision": ["Restored", "NotRestored"],
        "appeal.financial_decision": ["Restore", "PartialRestore", "NoRestore"],
        "ticket.status": ["Draft", "Submitted", "Open", "Assigned", "AdminReply", "WaitingForWorker", "Resolved", "Closed", "Reopened"],
        "ticket.close_reason": ["Resolved", "ClosedByWorker", "ClosedByAdmin", "AutoClosedNoResponse"],
        "bug_report.affected_area": ["Onboarding", "Training", "Work Assignment", "Screenshot Submission", "Review", "Wallet", "Withdrawal", "Payroll", "Support", "Appeals", "Admin Dashboard", "Other"],
        "bug_report.severity": ["Minor", "Major", "Critical"],
        "bug_report.resolution_type": ["UserError", "Duplicate", "CannotReproduce", "ConfirmedBug", "Fixed"],
        "notification.type": ["Silent", "Normal", "Urgent"],
        "notification.status": ["Unread", "Read", "Archived"],
        "admin.role": ["Super Admin", "Review Admin", "Payroll Admin", "Support Admin", "Operations Admin"]
    }

    role_permissions = {
        "Super Admin": ["*"],
        "Review Admin": ["review:view", "review:decide", "investigation:view", "worker:view", "timeline:view"],
        "Payroll Admin": ["wallet:view", "withdrawal:view", "withdrawal:verify", "payroll:execute", "worker:view", "timeline:view"],
        "Support Admin": ["support:view", "support:reply", "bug:view", "bug:reply", "worker:view", "timeline:view"],
        "Operations Admin": ["worker:view", "worker:pause", "worker:remove", "instagram:manage", "training:verify", "dashboard:view", "search:view", "timeline:view"]
    }

    Bot.saveData("iwms_constants", constants)
    Bot.saveData("iwms_enums", enums)
    Bot.saveData("iwms_role_permissions", role_permissions)
    Bot.saveData("iwms_initialized_at", timestamp)

    User.saveData("audit_input", {
        "actor_admin": str(u),
        "action_type": "foundation_initialized",
        "target_ref": "system:foundation",
        "before_state": {},
        "after_state": {"version": IWMS_VERSION, "initialized_at": timestamp}
    })
    Bot.runCommand("foundation_audit_writer")

    Bot.sendMessage("Foundation initialized for IWMS v" + IWMS_VERSION + ".", parse_mode="HTML")

except Exception as e:
    User.saveData("error_context", {"command": "foundation_init", "error": str(e)})
    Bot.runCommand("foundation_error_log")
    Bot.sendMessage("Something went wrong, please try again. Our team has been notified.")

try: # Technical logs are sent to the Log Channel only; they are not persisted in Bot storage. context = User.getData("error_context") if context == None: context = {} command = context.get("command", "unknown_command") error = context.get("error", "unknown_error") actor = context.get("actor", str(u)) now = libs.DateAndTime.now(BOT_TIMEZONE) timestamp = now["date"] + " " + now["time"] text = "IWMS Technical Error\n\nCommand: " + str(command) + "\nActor: " + str(actor) + "\nTime: " + str(timestamp) + "\nError: " + str(error) + "" Bot.sendMessage(text, chat_id=LOG_CHANNEL_ID, parse_mode="HTML") User.deleteData("error_context") except Exception: # Avoid recursive logging if the log channel itself is unavailable. pass

try:
    # Appends a permanent worker-facing business event.
    event = User.getData("timeline_input")
    if event == None:
        raise Exception("Missing timeline_input")

    worker_id = event.get("worker_id")
    event_type = event.get("event_type")
    payload = event.get("payload", {})
    if worker_id == None or event_type == None:
        raise Exception("Timeline worker_id and event_type are required")

    now = libs.DateAndTime.now(BOT_TIMEZONE)
    timestamp = now["date"] + " " + now["time"]

    seq = libs.Resources.globalRes("seq_timeline_" + str(worker_id)).add(1)
    if isinstance(seq, dict):
        seq = seq.get("value")
    if seq == None:
        seq = libs.Resources.globalRes("seq_timeline_" + str(worker_id)).value()
    seq = int(seq)

    timeline = Bot.getData("timeline:" + str(worker_id))
    if timeline == None:
        timeline = []

    record = {
        "event_id": "TL-" + str(worker_id) + "-{:06d}".format(seq),
        "worker_id": worker_id,
        "event_type": event_type,
        "payload": payload,
        "timestamp": timestamp
    }
    timeline.append(record)
    Bot.saveData("timeline:" + str(worker_id), timeline)
    User.saveData("timeline_result", {"ok": True, "event": record})
    User.deleteData("timeline_input")

except Exception as e:
    User.saveData("timeline_result", {"ok": False, "error": str(e)})
    User.saveData("error_context", {"command": "foundation_timeline_writer", "error": str(e)})
    Bot.runCommand("foundation_error_log")

try:
    # Appends a permanent audit record for admin or business-consequence actions.
    item = User.getData("audit_input")
    if item == None:
        raise Exception("Missing audit_input")

    actor_admin = item.get("actor_admin", str(u))
    action_type = item.get("action_type")
    target_ref = item.get("target_ref")
    before_state = item.get("before_state", {})
    after_state = item.get("after_state", {})

    if action_type == None or target_ref == None:
        raise Exception("Audit action_type and target_ref are required")

    now = libs.DateAndTime.now(BOT_TIMEZONE)
    timestamp = now["date"] + " " + now["time"]
    year = now["date"].split("-")[0]

    seq = libs.Resources.globalRes("seq_audit_" + year).add(1)
    if isinstance(seq, dict):
        seq = seq.get("value")
    if seq == None:
        seq = libs.Resources.globalRes("seq_audit_" + year).value()
    seq = int(seq)

    record_id = "AUD-" + year + "-{:06d}".format(seq)
    record = {
        "record_id": record_id,
        "actor_admin": actor_admin,
        "action_type": action_type,
        "target_ref": target_ref,
        "before_state": before_state,
        "after_state": after_state,
        "timestamp": timestamp
    }

    Bot.saveData("audit:" + record_id, record)
    index = Bot.getData("audit_index")
    if index == None:
        index = []
    index.append(record_id)
    Bot.saveData("audit_index", index)

    User.saveData("audit_result", {"ok": True, "record": record})
    User.deleteData("audit_input")

except Exception as e:
    User.saveData("audit_result", {"ok": False, "error": str(e)})
    User.saveData("error_context", {"command": "foundation_audit_writer", "error": str(e)})
    Bot.runCommand("foundation_error_log")

try:
    # The only approved wallet mutation path. It appends entries and updates summary cache.
    entry = User.getData("ledger_input")
    if entry == None:
        raise Exception("Missing ledger_input")

    worker_id = entry.get("worker_id")
    entry_type = entry.get("type")
    amount = entry.get("amount")
    reason = entry.get("reason", "")
    related_request_id = entry.get("related_request_id")
    related_appeal_id = entry.get("related_appeal_id")

    valid_types = ["RewardCredit", "WithdrawLock", "Processing", "Withdrawn", "Available", "Forfeited"]
    if worker_id == None or entry_type not in valid_types:
        raise Exception("Ledger worker_id and valid type are required")
    if amount == None:
        raise Exception("Ledger amount is required")

    amount = float(amount)
    now = libs.DateAndTime.now(BOT_TIMEZONE)
    timestamp = now["date"] + " " + now["time"]
    year = now["date"].split("-")[0]

    seq = libs.Resources.globalRes("seq_ledger_" + year).add(1)
    if isinstance(seq, dict):
        seq = seq.get("value")
    if seq == None:
        seq = libs.Resources.globalRes("seq_ledger_" + year).value()
    seq = int(seq)

    ledger_key = "ledger:" + str(worker_id)
    ledger = Bot.getData(ledger_key)
    if ledger == None:
        ledger = []

    record = {
        "entry_id": "TX-" + year + "-{:06d}".format(seq),
        "worker_id": worker_id,
        "type": entry_type,
        "amount": amount,
        "related_request_id": related_request_id,
        "related_appeal_id": related_appeal_id,
        "reason": reason,
        "timestamp": timestamp
    }
    ledger.append(record)
    Bot.saveData(ledger_key, ledger)

    available = 0.0
    locked = 0.0
    processing = 0.0
    for item in ledger:
        t = item.get("type")
        a = float(item.get("amount", 0))
        if t == "RewardCredit" or t == "Available":
            available += a
        elif t == "WithdrawLock":
            available -= a
            locked += a
        elif t == "Processing":
            locked -= a
            processing += a
        elif t == "Withdrawn":
            processing -= a
        elif t == "Forfeited":
            available -= a

    summary = {"available": available, "locked": locked, "processing": processing, "last_ledger_entry_id": record["entry_id"], "last_reconciled_at": timestamp}
    Bot.saveData("wallet_summary:" + str(worker_id), summary)

    User.saveData("audit_input", {"actor_admin": str(u), "action_type": "ledger_append", "target_ref": "ledger:" + str(worker_id), "before_state": {}, "after_state": record})
    Bot.runCommand("foundation_audit_writer")

    User.saveData("ledger_result", {"ok": True, "entry": record, "summary": summary})
    User.deleteData("ledger_input")

except Exception as e:
    User.saveData("ledger_result", {"ok": False, "error": str(e)})
    User.saveData("audit_input", {"actor_admin": str(u), "action_type": "ledger_partial_failure", "target_ref": "ledger:unknown", "before_state": {}, "after_state": {"error": str(e)}})
    Bot.runCommand("foundation_audit_writer")
    User.saveData("error_context", {"command": "foundation_ledger_writer", "error": str(e)})
    Bot.runCommand("foundation_error_log")

try:
    # Dispatches Silent, Normal, or Urgent notifications and preserves Notification Center history.
    notice = User.getData("notification_input")
    if notice == None:
        raise Exception("Missing notification_input")

    worker_user_id = notice.get("worker_user_id")
    worker_id = notice.get("worker_id")
    notification_type = notice.get("type")
    message_text = notice.get("message")
    payload = notice.get("payload", {})

    if worker_user_id == None or notification_type == None or message_text == None:
        raise Exception("Notification worker_user_id, type, and message are required")
    if notification_type not in ["Silent", "Normal", "Urgent"]:
        raise Exception("Invalid notification type")

    now = libs.DateAndTime.now(BOT_TIMEZONE)
    timestamp = now["date"] + " " + now["time"]
    seq = libs.Resources.globalRes("seq_notification_" + str(worker_user_id)).add(1)
    if isinstance(seq, dict):
        seq = seq.get("value")
    if seq == None:
        seq = libs.Resources.globalRes("seq_notification_" + str(worker_user_id)).value()
    seq = int(seq)

    notifications = User.getData("notifications", user=worker_user_id)
    if notifications == None:
        notifications = []

    record = {"notification_id": "NTF-" + str(worker_user_id) + "-{:06d}".format(seq), "type": notification_type, "message": message_text, "status": "Unread", "payload": payload, "created_at": timestamp}
    notifications.append(record)
    User.saveData("notifications", notifications, user=worker_user_id)

    if notification_type != "Silent":
        Bot.sendMessage(message_text, chat_id=worker_user_id, parse_mode="HTML")

    if worker_id != None:
        User.saveData("timeline_input", {"worker_id": worker_id, "event_type": "notification_created", "payload": record})
        Bot.runCommand("foundation_timeline_writer")

    User.saveData("notification_result", {"ok": True, "notification": record})
    User.deleteData("notification_input")

except Exception as e:
    User.saveData("notification_result", {"ok": False, "error": str(e)})
    User.saveData("error_context", {"command": "foundation_notification_dispatcher", "error": str(e)})
    Bot.runCommand("foundation_error_log")
